name: kineticsocialcards
title: Kinetic Social Cards
description: A "God-Tier" Kinetic Social Profile Exhibition. Features: - Masonry Layout: Optimized flow for cards of varying heights. - Brand Aura Lighting: Adaptive underglow matching brand colors. - Full-Color Fidelity: High-fidelity SVG logos for an authentic look. - Isometric Spring Tilt: Tactile 3D response to cursor position. - Liquid Button Reveal: Hidden CTAs that spring into view on hover.
